name: Wanjia Indestry Selection Equity Fund (LOF)
summary: Wanjia Indestry Selection Equity Fund (LOF) is a stock fund that focuses on investing in selected industries and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation by identifying and investing in companies with strong growth potential in specific industries. It is managed by Wanjia Asset Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
